project_type: Monorepo with 9 Next.js/React apps, shared packages, Fastify backends
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turborepo. Workspace defined in pnpm-workspace.yaml (apps/*, packages/*). turbo.json defines tasks: lint, typecheck, test, build, dev.
test_framework: Vitest 2.x with globals:true. Root vitest.config.ts, individual packages have their own. Tests in __tests__/ directories.
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm turbo typecheck to verify type correctness. 2. Run pnpm turbo test to run all tests. 3. For individual packages, cd into them and run their specific test/typecheck script.
setup_instructions: pnpm install from root. Node 22+ required. packageManager field enforces pnpm@10.28.1.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network - can install from npm registries. No Docker daemon available for image builds. Node 22 pre-installed.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, TypeScript strict mode, ESM modules (type: module), Tailwind CSS for styling, React components with proper TypeScript props interfaces and accessibility (aria attributes).
key_patterns: Components use React.FC with exported Props interfaces. Tailwind CSS utility classes for styling. Packages export from src/index.ts barrel. Dependencies between packages use workspace:* protocol. AI engine uses Vercel AI SDK with OpenAI/Anthropic providers. Apps have api/ (Fastify backend) and src/ (React frontend) directories. tsconfig paths map @quant/* to packages.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (9 apps), packages/ (27 packages), infra/, scripts/. Each app has api/ (Fastify) and src/ (React frontend). packages/shared-ui has components/, hooks/, themes/, advanced/ dirs. packages/ai has core/ (engine, router, cache, safety, cost) and services/ (chat-ai, mail-ai, etc).
